# Thursday

| Time   | Content             | Teaching form    | Teacher            |                 
| ------ | ------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------ |
| 9-11h  | **Perform task 6.1 to 6.5** | Little groups |  |
| 11-13h | **IM in practice** | Plenary session | hosted by Dr Nicole Oei
| 13-15h | **Step 5** | Little groups |  |
| 15-18h | **Finish tasks and presentation** | Little groups |  |
